response: The levels of 25-hydroxy vitamin D (25OH-VD) and fatty acid (FF) levels of TNF-α, 25OH-VD, and TAC were measured using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits according to the manufacturer's instructions and were read using a 96-well microplate ELISA reader (Dynatech MR 7000). - The level of 25-hydroxy vitamin D in serum was measured using an ELISA kit (catalog number ab213966, Abcam Inc., [City, Country]) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique (16). - The level of TNF-α in serum was measured using an ELISA kit (catalog number ab46087, Abcam Inc., [City, Country]) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique (17). - The level of TAC in serum was measured using an ELISA kit (catalog number ab65329, Abcam Inc., [City, Country]) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique (18).
